subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Strive ye, as far as ye are able, to bind fast the cords of fellowship, and be ye like unto a brimming cup with love for one another [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء تا توانید عقد الفت بندید و از محبت یکدیگر چون جام سرشار
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @spiritual transformation, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
